title: SkillManifest
description: A declared agent capability (skill) with activation rules, binary/tool requirements, policy bindings, expected artifact outputs, and safety settings.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

version.description: Semver version of this skill manifest.

entryDoc.description: Path or URN of the primary documentation or instruction file for this skill.

description.description: One-paragraph description of what this skill does and when to use it.

activationRules.description: Conditions under which this skill should be automatically activated: slash commands, file patterns, or intent tags.

requires.description: Runtime requirements: required binaries, any-of binaries, and required tool names.

executionSurfaceRef.description: Optional URN of an ExecutionSurface override for this skill. Pattern: urn:srcos:surface:<id>

policyBindings.description: Policy URNs that govern use of this skill.

artifactOutputs.description: Identifiers of artifact types this skill is expected to produce.

reviewMode.description: When true, the skill operates in review-only mode and must not make changes.

allowShellExecution.description: Whether this skill is permitted to execute shell commands.

protectedPaths.description: File system paths this skill must not access.
